Transactions Structured To Avoid Detection
SQL_TEXT:
SELECT st.account_number,account_name,
  crf_type,CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)) amt_lcy,business_date,dt.narrative tran_type,st.narrative,
  st.date_time_custom 
FROM ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_stmt_entry st,
ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_transaction_details dt,ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_accounts ac
WHERE st.transaction_code=dt.transaction_code AND st.account_number=ac.account_number
AND CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)) BETWEEN -9999.00 and -9900.00
AND business_date between '2023-03-20' and '2023-03-30'
ORDER BY CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)) desc

NAME: Unusual Transaction In customer's account
SQL_TEXT:
SELECT st.account_number
  ,account_name
  ,crf_type
  ,CASE WHEN CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2))<0 THEN CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)) END outflows
  ,CASE WHEN CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2))>0 THEN CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)) END inflows
  ,sm.avg_tran
  ,st.business_date
  ,st.transaction_code
  ,st.date_time_custom
FROM ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_stmt_entry st,ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_transaction_details dt,ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_accounts ac,
    (SELECT account_number,Avg(Abs(CAST(amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)))) avg_tran 
        FROM ICOMPLY_STERLING.st_stmt_entry 
        WHERE transaction_code IN ('799','258','28','866','792','782','806','849')
        GROUP BY account_number) sm
WHERE st.transaction_code=dt.transaction_code 
AND st.account_number=ac.account_number
AND sm.account_number=st.account_number
AND st.transaction_code IN ('799','258','28','866','792','782','806','849')
AND Abs(CAST(st.amt_lcy AS DECIMAL(36,2)))>sm.avg_tran*10
ORDER BY date_time_custom ASC

NAME: Account Opened Last 6 Months [Test]
SQL_TEXT:
select * from(select a.account_number,c.full_name,a.product_name,a.branch_code,b.branch_name,
a.date_created,helpers.number_format(a.balance) current_balance,
d.account_officer_name,a.email_address,a.phone_numbers 
from am_customer_account a,am_branch b,am_customer c,am_account_officers d 
where a.branch_code=b.branch_code and a.customer_id=c.customer_id 
and c.account_officer_id=d.account_officer_id
and trim(a.customer_id) is not null and 
a.date_created > trunc(sysdate) - interval '6' month) where 1=1 and product_name='DOMICILIARY-INDIVIDUAL'

Recently Modified BVN Number [Test]
SQL_TEXT:
with previous_data as ( select cli customer_id,valmt old_bvn_value from testdev.bkicli@tajbank 
as of timestamp systimestamp - interval '1' hour where iden='001' ) 
select b.customer_id,p.old_bvn_value,b.bvn new_bvn_value,c.firstname,c.lastname,c.branch_code,d.branch_name,(
    select account_number from am_account where customer_id = p.customer_id and rownum=1) account_number,
(
    select account_type from am_account where customer_id = p.customer_id and rownum=1) account_name,
    o.account_officer_name
from am_bvn_recent_modified b,previous_data p,am_customer c,
am_account_officers o ,am_branch d 
where b.customer_id=p.customer_id 
and p.customer_id=c.customer_id 
and c.account_officer_id = o.account_officer_id
and c.branch_code = d.branch_code

SQL_TEXT:
select a.account_number,a.account_name,a.branch_code|| ' ' ||b.branch_name branch,a.gl_code,
a.currency_code || ' '||c.currency_name currency,
(select max(balance_date) from am_account_balance_hist) last_tran_date,
helpers.number_format((select balance from am_account_balance_hist where balance_date=(select max(balance_date) from am_account_balance_hist) 
and account_number='1014010001' and rownum=1)) balance_as_at_last_tran_date,
helpers.number_format(a.balance) current_balance 
from am_customer_account a,am_branch b,am_currency c  
where a.account_number='1014010001' and a.branch_code=b.branch_code 
and a.currency_code=c.currency_id
and a.branch_code='00001'

Daily NOSTRO Account Balance
SQL_TEXT:
with tran as (select max(balance_date) tran_date from am_account_balance_hist),
accounts as (select a.account_number,
a.branch_code,a.gl_code,a.currency_code,
helpers.number_format(a.balance) bal_as_at_last_tran_date,to_char(a.balance_date,'DD-MON-YYYY') last_tran_date
from am_account_balance_hist a, 
tran t where a.balance_date=t.tran_date 
and a.account_number in ('1015250001',
'1015240001',
'1015010002',
'1015060001',
'1015010003',
'1015050001',
'1015010001',
'1015030003',
'1015220002',
'1016800002',
'1016800003',
'1015030002',
'1016800001',
'1015220001',
'1015030004',
'1015030001',
'1015040006',
'1015040005',
'1015040003',
'1015040008',
'1015040002',
'1015040007',
'1015040009',
'1015040004',
'1014010001') and a.branch_code='00001' )
select c.account_number,
(select account_name from am_customer_account where account_number=c.account_number and rownum=1) account_name,
c.currency_code || ' '|| d.currency_name currency,
c.branch_code || ' '||b.branch_name branch,c.gl_code,
c.bal_as_at_last_tran_date,
c.last_tran_date,
helpers.number_format((select current_balance from am_account_balance where account_number=c.account_number and current_balance is not null and rownum=1)) current_balance 
from accounts c,am_branch b,am_currency d 
where c.branch_code=b.branch_code and c.currency_code=d.currency_id 
and c.branch_code='00001'

SQL_TEXT:
select upper(c.title) title,c.process_type category,staff_responsible,upper(c.status) status,
created_by, to_char(c.created_at,'DD-MON-YYYY HH24:MI') created_at, since
from am_cases c
where lower(c.status) = 'open' 
and days_overdue >= config.get_parameter('case_overdue_days')
